title: ixeris retrorsidens
intro: Ixeris retrorsidens, also known as the Chinese false dandelion or bitter lettuce, is a plant species in the sunflower family native to China and parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and diarrhea. Ixeris retrorsidens has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, with its health benefits attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. In herbal medicine, the plant's roots and leaves can be prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
